headline: Evergy (EVRG) Reports Q1 EPS Beat
summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) is one of the 10 Best Utility Stocks that Beat Earnings Estimates. On May 7, 2026, Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) reported Q1 adjusted EPS of 69c, ahead of the 61c consensus estimate. Chairman and CEO David Campbell said the company continued advancing its large customer strategy during the quarter and announced the signing […]
